// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace Different.Namespace
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from MyAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class MyAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMyAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MyService, global::TestNamespace.MyService>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IMyService, global::TestNamespace.MyService>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
